details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that fully meets all rubric requirements. The PixelArt provider package is correctly structured under packages/pixelart/ with proper package.json. The exported createPixelArt factory function and PixelArtProvider interface are implemented correctly. The PixelArtImageModel class properly implements ImageModelV3 with a doGenerate method (the correct interface, not a literal 'generateImage' method). Image settings correctly support size, style enum ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), and pixelDensity (1-16). The base URL is correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'. The package structure mirrors existing AI SDK providers with proper tsconfig, build config, test files, and documentation. Only new files were created; tsconfig.json was correctly updated to reference the new package (which is necessary). Comprehensive tests and warnings for unsupported features (seed, aspectRatio, files, mask) are included. Minor deduction only because there could be edge cases in test coverage or API compatibility details not visible in the diff.
